real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yeah
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm doing already how are you doing
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
northern illinois
really (really)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
two and a half years ago
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
haven't yet
since i been here
why2 (why)
haven't had a chance to gonna go back later this year
cool3 (cool)
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
colder
or warmer
see_mean (i see what you mean)
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
work
happy_didthat (are you happy you did that)
yeah
adapted_LA (how easy was it for you to get used to living in l_a)
mm took a little while but i got used to it
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
no weather xxx variations comparative um
traffic
sunlight
mm (mm)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
a little bit
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
seeing different things
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
been to europe a couple of times
been around the country
nice (nice)
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
<sigh> hmm
visiting yosemite and sequoia parks were fun
cool3 (cool)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
depends on the circumstance most of the time i can fake outgoing or try to be outgoing
mhm (mhm)
what_do_when_annoyed (what do you do when you are annoyed)
try to relax and breathe through it and move on
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
depends on the context
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
probably yesterday and my children about them not doing what they were told to do
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
arguments with my wife where i should've probably been more patient and understanding
give_example (can you give me an example of that)
hmm
um
sometimes when it's more of a hormonal period like this week i should just probably breathe through things and
recognize that she's going through things and i should just be more patient
okay_confirm (okay)
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
um
what i was gonna do with my life
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
it was easy when i was nineteen i could just decide to do strange difficult things and
had the boldness to follow through with them
study (what did you study at school)
hebrew and semitic studies and classics
sounds_interesting (that sounds interesting)
still_working_on_X (are you still working in that)
kind of
dream_job (what's your dream job)
um i'm i'm in ministry and
that's working out the way i kinda want it to be
thats_good (that's good)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
hmm
some embarrassing things when i was a teenager probably
okay_confirm (okay)
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
it's pretty strong
family_roleB (how close are you to your family)
i talk to my parents about once a day maybe
once every other day and
i'm constantly talking with my wife and children
xxx
kids_elaborate (tell me about your kids)
i've got four of them they keep me very busy um they're between
nine and three
easy_parent (do you find it easy to be a parent)
sometimes most of the time no
parent_hardest (what's the hardest thing about being a parent)
character development recognizing that
they need <n> need space to grow
yeah3 (yeah)
parent_best (what's the best thing about being a parent)
when
when it works and you see character development and growth and
and exploration
parent_differences (what are some ways that you're different as a parent than your parents)
i have more standards willingness to enforce standards
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
mm <sigh> mm
my wife
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
um
she's been there for me for fifteen years now and
helped give me the self-confidence to be who i am
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
better now that i'm not drinking as much pop at night
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
irritable
shorter temper
mhm (mhm)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
mm
pretty good pretty good i'm doing
been making some better uh decisions with my uh diet it's doing better
thats_great (that's great)
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
<sigh>
mm
feel a little bit more empowered not as defeatist as i was in a process where i wasn't eating very well wasn't exercising
wasn't able to get doing those things i've been doing a little better at that recently past few weeks and that's been a little bit more encouraging
uh_huh (uh huh)
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
no
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
nope
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
really happy um
probably a few weeks ago at the beach when everybody was having a good time
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
hmm
confident
loud
intelligent
okay_confirm (okay)
i guess
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
hmm more patient
more um
more able to
automatically engage with people as opposed to being hesitant at first
mm (mm)
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
oh
middle school when i was always the
low man on the totem pole socially
<sniffle>
being the constant butt of jokes
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
don't fall in the trap of thinking that middle and high school is life
mhm (mhm)
ideal_weekendC (tell me how you spend your ideal weekend)
<laughter>
um some time you know with children and family doing <d> doing some fun activity beach or museum or something
some time with the wife some time just by myself to read and kinda refocus
okay_confirm (okay)
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
hmm
mm participate in some high level academic discussions
cool3 (cool)
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
hmm
that i've been able to
maintain the standard and quality of life for myself and my family that i've been able to do so far
thats_great (that's great)
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
bye (goodbye)
